hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/package.json" ] && [ -d "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules" ]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30 || true; fi

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|md|css)$ ]] && [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/.bin/prettier" ]; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/.bin/prettier" --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
echo '[hook] P2P Payment Request — session started. Project root: '$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR
